---
title: "Contribute"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="masthead">
  <span>Electoral Atlas · Spanish Second Republic · 1931–1936</span>
  <div class="lang-switcher">
    <a href="../en/contribute.html" class="lang-btn active">EN</a>
    <a href="../es/contribute.html" class="lang-btn">ES</a>
    <a href="../ca/contribute.html" class="lang-btn">CA</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-flag"></div>
  <div class="page-header-label">Community</div>
  <h1 class="page-header-title">Contribute to the Atlas</h1>
  <p class="page-header-sub">Report errors, share new data, or get in touch</p>
</div>

<section class="content-section">
  <div class="contact-grid">

    <!-- LEFT: Form -->
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Send a message</div>
      <h2 class="section-title" style="font-size:1.4rem;">Found an error?<br>Have more data?</h2>
      <p class="section-body" style="font-size:0.9rem;">
        This dataset is a work in progress. If you spot an error in the election results,
        know of additional sources, or have data that could improve coverage, we would love
        to hear from you. Use the form below — it opens your email client with the
        relevant fields pre-filled.
      </p>

      <!-- Type selector -->
      <div class="contact-form-group">
        <label class="contact-label">Type of contribution</label>
        <select class="contact-select" id="msg-type" onchange="updateSubject()">
          <option value="error">Report a data error</option>
          <option value="data">Provide additional data</option>
          <option value="source">Suggest a new source</option>
          <option value="other">General enquiry</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="contact-form-group">
        <label class="contact-label">Municipality (if applicable)</label>
        <input type="text" class="contact-input" id="muni-name" placeholder="e.g. Lleida, Teruel, Badajoz…">
      </div>

      <div class="contact-form-group">
        <label class="contact-label">Election year (if applicable)</label>
        <select class="contact-select" id="election-year">
          <option value="">All years</option>
          <option value="1931">1931</option>
          <option value="1933">1933</option>
          <option value="1936">1936</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="contact-form-group">
        <label class="contact-label">Your message</label>
        <textarea class="contact-textarea" id="msg-body"
          placeholder="Please describe the error, the new data, or your question in as much detail as possible…"></textarea>
      </div>

      <a id="send-btn" href="#" class="contact-submit" onclick="sendEmail(event)">
        ✉ &nbsp; Send via email
      </a>

      <p style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1rem;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
        This will open your default email client. No data is stored on this website.
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- RIGHT: Info blocks -->
    <div>
      <div class="section-label">Contact information</div>

      <div class="contact-info-block">
        <div class="contact-info-label">Principal investigator</div>
        <div class="contact-info-value">Your Name</div>
        <div class="contact-info-sub">Department of Political and Social Sciences<br>Universitat Pompeu Fabra</div>
      </div>

      <div class="contact-info-block">
        <div class="contact-info-label">Email</div>
        <div class="contact-info-value">
          <a href="mailto:yourname@upf.edu" style="color:var(--republic);">yourname@upf.edu</a>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-info-sub">Response within 5–7 working days</div>
      </div>

      <div class="contact-info-block">
        <div class="contact-info-label">What we welcome</div>
        <div class="contact-info-sub" style="font-size:0.85rem;line-height:1.7;">
          ✓ &nbsp; Corrections to vote totals or shares<br>
          ✓ &nbsp; Missing municipalities<br>
          ✓ &nbsp; Links to archival sources<br>
          ✓ &nbsp; Scanned primary documents<br>
          ✓ &nbsp; Regional or provincial datasets
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="contact-info-block">
        <div class="contact-info-label">Citation</div>
        <div class="contact-info-sub" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.7rem;line-height:1.6;">
          Author (2025). <em>Electoral Atlas of the Spanish Second Republic</em>.
          Universitat Pompeu Fabra. [online]
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>Electoral Atlas of the Spanish Second Republic &nbsp;·&nbsp; Universitat Pompeu Fabra &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2025</p>
</footer>

<script>
const CONTACT_EMAIL = 'yourname@upf.edu';  // ← change this

const typeSubjects = {
  error:  'Data error report — Electoral Atlas',
  data:   'Additional data — Electoral Atlas',
  source: 'Source suggestion — Electoral Atlas',
  other:  'Enquiry — Electoral Atlas',
};

function updateSubject() {
  // Just used internally; subject is set at send time
}

function sendEmail(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const type  = document.getElementById('msg-type').value;
  const muni  = document.getElementById('muni-name').value.trim();
  const year  = document.getElementById('election-year').value;
  const body  = document.getElementById('msg-body').value.trim();

  let subject = typeSubjects[type];
  if (muni) subject += ` · ${muni}`;
  if (year) subject += ` (${year})`;

  let mailBody = body;
  if (muni || year) {
    mailBody = `Municipality: ${muni || 'N/A'}\nElection year: ${year || 'N/A'}\n\n${body}`;
  }

  const mailto = `mailto:${CONTACT_EMAIL}?subject=${encodeURIComponent(subject)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(mailBody)}`;
  window.location.href = mailto;
}
</script>
```
